LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Stone.label: giant's arrow (stone)
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Stone.descripti: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a giant's bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Steel.label: giant's arrow (steel)
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Steel.descripti: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a giant's bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Plasteel.label: giant's arrow (plasteel)
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Plasteel.descri: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a giant's bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Venom.label: giant's arrow (venom)
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Venom.descripti: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a giant's bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Flame.label: giant's arrow (flame)
LanguageData.Ammo_BigSmall_GiantArrow_Flame.descripti: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a giant's bow.
